name: 𝙃𝙊𝙐𝙉𝘿 | Mark Grayson
description:
Hero!user × No Goggles!Mark

੭﹕ ̊ ̟✃𓄧꒷꒦

✎┆ꜰᴏʀ ᴛʜᴇ ʟᴀꜱᴛ ᴛɪᴍᴇ

"Time will go back and you'll forget all that was between you and me. You and me."

╰┈➤ Summary

Mark, after agreeing to Angstrom Levy's plan, kills the Guardians of the Globe, which user is a part of. Nolan had killed user in his dimension to teach Mark a lesson about the fragile nature of humans compared to Viltrumites. He was still bitter about losing his favorite pet. But now, he has a chance to replace them.
